sevenDay.synopsis: We're seeing widespread VFR conditions across the LFA, and that will continue thru the weekend. NEG hazards are anticipated. Starting Tuesday, there's a low-end chance for ISOLD showers/TS during the PM. And temperatures will be heating up early next week, pushing the 90-degree mark.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 14 MAY - 20 MAY
